name: Norah Jones
abstract: Norah Jones ( NOR-ə; born Geethali Norah Jones Shankar, March 30, 1979) is an American singer-songwriter and musician. She has won several awards for her music and, as of 2023, has sold more than 53 million records worldwide.

concerts.label: Gillian Welch and David Rawlings
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Buckingham,
about_quotes.evidence: He’s one of the masters of all time. And he recorded in the early 60s Sam Cooke and people like that, up through Norah Jones.
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Buckingham, interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, February 25, 2019 [interview 1 of 2]
